title: Add Object Type Filters for Custom, Share, History, and Change Objects
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to filter the object picker by object type (Custom, Share, History, Change), so that I can quickly find the category of objects I need.
description:
Add new filter options to the object selection dropdown to categorize Salesforce objects:

- **Custom Objects**: objects ending with `__c` in the API name
- **Share Objects**: labels prefixed with "Share:"
- **History Objects**: labels prefixed with "History:"
- **Change Objects**: labels prefixed with "Change:"

Also revisit the managed package filter to ensure it works correctly after refreshing the object list.
acceptance_criteria: Custom Objects filter shows only __c objects
Share Objects filter shows only Share:-prefixed objects
History Objects filter shows only History:-prefixed objects
Change Objects filter shows only Change:-prefixed objects
Managed package filter works after object list refresh
ux_changes: New filter categories in object picker: Custom, Share, History, Change. Updated managed package filter.
middleware_changes: Filter logic for object name suffix (__c) and label prefix matching (Share:, History:, Change:).
implementation_notes: Managed package filters require refreshing the object list first to populate correctly.
comment_summary: Waqar deployed to production and noted the managed package filter requires an object list refresh.
